zh.lifeSummary: 當Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen於1233年出生在歐登伯格阿赤 維爾德沙奧森時，她的父親Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg31歲，母親Elisabeth von Tecklenburg11歲。她於大約1280年與Graf Christian III von Oldenburg結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1315年2月13日在德國福萊斯塔阿特 歐登伯格享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen于1233年出生在歐登伯格阿赤 維爾德沙奧森时，她的父亲Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg31岁，母亲Elisabeth von Tecklenburg11岁。她于大约1280年与Graf Christian III von Oldenburg结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1315年2月13日在德国福萊斯塔阿特 歐登伯格享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen was born in 1233, in Wildeshausen, Oldenburg, her father, Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg, was 31 and her mother, Elisabeth von Tecklenburg, was 11. She married Graf Christian III von Oldenburg about 1280. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 13 February 1315, in Oldenburg, Germany, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen est née en 1233, à Amt Wildeshausen, Oldenburg, son père, Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth von Tecklenburg, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Graf Christian III von Oldenburg environ 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 13 février 1315, à Freistaat Oldenburg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen 1233 in Amt Wildeshausen, Oldenburg geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg 31 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth von Tecklenburg 11. Sie hat um 1280 Graf Christian III von Oldenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 13. Februar 1315 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Freistaat Oldenburg, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen è nata il nel 1233 nel Amt Wildeshausen, Oldenburg, sua padre, Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth von Tecklenburg, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Graf Christian III von Oldenburg circa 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 13 febbraio 1315, nel Freistaat Oldenburg, Germania, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausenが1233年にオルデンブルグアムト ウィルデシャウセンで生まれた時，父Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburgは31歳，母Elisabeth von Tecklenburgは11歳であった。約1280年にGraf Christian III von Oldenburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1315年2月13日にドイツフレイスタアト オルデンブルグで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen(이)가 1233년 덴버그 아트 윌데쇼센에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth von Tecklenburg(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 대략 1280년 Graf Christian III von Oldenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1315년 2월 13일 독일 프레이스타앳 덴버그에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen nasceu em 1233, em Amt Wildeshausen, Oldenburg, seu pai, Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth von Tecklenburg, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Graf Christian III von Oldenburg aproximadamente 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1315, em Freistaat Oldenburg, Alemanha, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen родилась в 1233 г. в местности амт уаилдешаусен, олденбург, её отцу по имени Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth von Tecklenburg, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graf Christian III von Oldenburg около 1280 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 13 февраля 1315 г. в местности фристаат олденбург, Германия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen nació en 1233, en Amt Wildeshausen, Oldenburg, su papá, Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elisabeth von Tecklenburg, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Graf Christian III von Oldenburg aproximadamente 1280. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 13 de febrero de 1315, en Freistaat Oldenburg, Alemania, a la edad de 82 años.
